parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=Generate a professional, educational event poster. 

Layout rules:
- The left half of the image must be covered with a solid orange background.
- Do not cover the person in the base image.
- Display the event title, date, time, and topics clearly within the orange area.
- Use minimal, clean icons for each element. 

Right side styling:
- Apply a subtle radial black gradient overlay to the non-orange area.
- Maintain high contrast and readability. 

Logo rules (CRITICAL):
- Place the provided logo entirely within the masked bottom-right area.
- Maintain a 1.5% margin from the edges.
- Do NOT modify, redraw, recolor, stylize, rotate, or distort the logo.
- Preserve the logo’s original proportions, colors, and sharpness.
- The logo is a protected brand asset.

Content to display:
Event: {{ $('Required Data').item.json.event_name }}
Date and Time: {{ $('Required Data').item.json.start_time }} to {{ $('Required Data').item.json.end_time }}
Summary: {{ $('Required Data').item.json.summary }}

parameters.text:
=Event name {{ $('Get event details').item.json['Event Name'] }}
Event summary {{ $('Get event details').item.json['Event Summary'] }}

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful assistant that generates a brief event overview header using the inputs.
Do not re-use the inputs, create a new one.

=You are a helpful assistant that generates an event overview description using the input.
Do not use double quotes please.

parameters.body:
={
  "firstName": "{{ $json.profile.first_name }}",
  "lastName": "{{ $json.profile.last_name }}",
  "phone": "{{ $json.answers[0].answer }}",
  "email": "{{ $json.profile.email }}",
  "tags": "{{ $('Get event details1').item.json.category_id }}",
  "event_name": "{{ $('Get event details1').item.json.name.text }}",
  "event_id": "{{ $json.event_id }}",
  "event_date_time": "{{ $('Get event details1').item.json.start.local }}",
  "event_link": "{{ $('Get event details1').item.json.url }}",
  "event_location": "{{ $('HTTP Request5').item.json.name }}, {{ $('HTTP Request5').item.json.address.localized_area_display }}",
  "active": "True"
}

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful assistant that generates a brief event overview header using the inputs.
Do not re-use the inputs, create a new one.

=You are a helpful assistant that generates an event overview description using the input.
Do not use double quotes please.
Use a maximum of 140 characters only.

=ROLE
You are a senior event marketer and brand copywriter specializing in professional networking, education, and community-driven business events. You write concise, confident, non-salesy copy that feels credible, local, and intentional.

OUTPUT:
3–5 short lines. First line is the hook. CTA on the final line.

CONSTRAINTS
Do not ask follow-up questions.
Do not include emojis unless explicitly requested.
Avoid generic marketing clichés unless industry-appropriate.
Write with clarity and confidence. Assume the event has credibility.

OUTPUT FORMAT
No filler text.
No hashtags in the body.
Do not use #.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=Generate a professional, educational event poster. 

Layout rules:
- The left half of the image must be covered with a solid orange background.

Content to display:
Event: {{ $('Edit Fields1').item.json['Event Name'] }}
Date and Time: {{ $('Edit Fields1').item.json['Start Time'] }} to {{ $('Edit Fields1').item.json['End Time'] }}
Summary: {{ $('Edit Fields1').item.json['Event Summary'] }}

parameters.body:
={
  "ticket_class": {
    "name": "Testing",
    "quantity_total": 100,
    "cost": "{{ $('Required Data1').item.json.currency }}, {{ $('Required Data1').item.json.ticket_price }}",
    "free": false,
    "sales_start": "{{ $now.toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'") }}",
    "sales_end": "{{ $('Required Data1').item.json.end_time }}",
    "hide_sale_dates": false,
    "description": "{{ $('Required Data1').item.json.event_name }}",
    "auto_hide_before": null,
    "auto_hide_after": null
  }
}

parameters.subject: =Modify Order Form Collecction Type for the Event {{ $('Required Data1').item.json.event_name }}
parameters.message:
=Please be change the collection type from "Ticket Buyer" to "Each Attendee" for the event {{ $('Required Data1').item.json.event_name }}

Access from this link: https://www.eventbrite.com/order-form?eid={{ $('Event ID1').item.json.event_id }}

parameters.body:
={
  "firstName": "{{ $json.contacts.firstName }}",
  "lastName": "{{ $json.contacts.lastName }}",
  "phone": "{{ $json.contacts.phone }}",
  "email": "{{ $json.contacts.email }}",
  "event_name": "{{ $('Edit Event Name1').item.json.name.text }}",
  "event_id": "{{ $('Edit Event ID1').item.json.event_id }}",
  "event_date_time": "{{ $('Edit Event Name1').item.json.start.local }}",
  "event_new_date": "{{ $('New Date1').item.json.new_date }}",
  "event_link": "{{ $('Edit Event Name1').item.json.url }}",
  "event_location": "{{ $('HTTP Request6').item.json.name }}, {{ $('HTTP Request6').item.json.address.localized_area_display }}"
}
